top_signals.title: Mercedes-Benz may be shut out of U.S. market under bill aimed at Chinese automaker ownership
top_signals.summary: Mercedes-Benz's largest individual shareholder is BAIC, a Chinese state-owned automaker. Sources told CNBC that exemptions in the legislation would not apply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Rio starts $1.5B expansion of Quebec aluminum smelter
top_signals.summary: AP60 is among the lowest-carbon aluminum smelting technologies operating at commercial scale, Rio said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
